statusDetail: Anton completed the scheduled site-improvement loop and recorded the result.
actionRequired: No action needed unless you want to review the latest commit.
summary:
Implemented the next Anton slice: a compact Diagnostics Workflow Index after the hero, with the hero shortcuts trimmed so mobile starts cleaner.

Changed:
- [diagnostics.html](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/diagnostics.html:38): added `#workflow-index` and six workflow cards.
- [styles.css](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/styles.css:7111): added responsive workflow-index card styling.
- [search-data.js](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/search-data.js:401): added search coverage for workflow-index queries.
- [service-worker.js](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/service-worker.js:1): bumped cache to `ridgeline-console-v255`.
- Updated Anton state/backlog/roadmap/audit docs, plus one durable ANTON note about smooth-scroll verification.

Verified:
- `Test-InternalLinks.ps1` passed for 16 HTML files.
- Playwright/Chrome checked desktop and iPhone-width Diagnostics rendering, no horizontal overflow, card navigation to `#trailer-light-workflow`, search result for `workflow index`, and Search Escape cleanup.
- Captured screenshots under `debug-screenshots/audit-v255-*`.

I left the pre-existing dirty `AGENT_LOOP.md` and untracked `tools/agent-loop/Install-AgentCatchupTask.ps1` alone. Next clean slice: either reduce duplicated lower-page Diagnostics routing now that the index exists, or add workflow-index assertions to the reusable browser smoke script.
